krantz/types

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Types
    • ColorKind
    • HistoryConfig
    • KrantzConfig
    • ParsedLine
    • Pipeline
    • PipelineSep
    • PolicyConfig
    • PolicyEngine

    • PolicyResultKind
    • PromptConfig
    • QuoteKind
    • Redirection
    • RedirectionKind
    • ShellState
    • SimpleCommand
    • Token
    • TokenKind

Types

ColorKind = enum
  ckNone = -1, ckBlack, ckRed, ckGreen, ckYellow, ckBlue, ckMagenta, ckCyan,
  ckWhite
HistoryConfig = object
  maxSize*: int
KrantzConfig = object
  policy*: PolicyConfig
  history*: HistoryConfig
  prompt*: PromptConfig
ParsedLine = object
  pipelines*: seq[Pipeline]
  separators*: seq[PipelineSep]
Pipeline = ref object
  commands*: seq[SimpleCommand]
  background*: bool
PipelineSep = enum
  psSequential, psAndThen, psOrElse
PolicyConfig = object
  deny*: seq[string]
PolicyEngine = ref object
  denyCommands*: seq[string]
PolicyResult = object
  kind*: PolicyResultKind
  message*: string
PolicyResultKind = enum
  prAllowed, prDenied
PromptConfig = object
  user*: bool
  host*: bool
  git*: bool
  cwdShort*: bool
QuoteKind = enum
  qkNone, qkSingle, qkDouble
Redirection = object
  kind*: RedirectionKind
  fd*: int
  target*: string
RedirectionKind = enum
  rkInput, rkOutput, rkOutputAppend, rkFdDup
ShellState = ref object
  config*: KrantzConfig
  policy*: PolicyEngine
  store*: Store
  lastExitCode*: int
  shouldExit*: bool
  prevDir*: string
  lastCwd*: string
  cachedBranch*: string
  vars*: TableRef[string, string]
SimpleCommand = ref object
  args*: seq[string]
  argQuotes*: seq[QuoteKind]
  redirects*: seq[Redirection]
  envVars*: seq[(string, string)]
Token = object
  kind*: TokenKind
  value*: string
  quoteKind*: QuoteKind
TokenKind = enum
  tokWord, tokPipe, tokRedirOut, tokRedirOutApp, tokRedirIn, tokFdDup,
  tokBothOut, tokBackground, tokSemicolon, tokAnd, tokOr, tokEOF

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-07-15 11:50:28 UTC
